title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist system automates medical discoveries using AI agents to identify novel treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other diseases. The system outperforms human experts on ranking scientific hypotheses and has identified unexpected drug combinations and genetic connections for various conditions.
